text: The department shall develop and maintain a database on roadside vehicle inspection reports for defects on any intermodal equipment. markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 644. Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Standards
##### § 644.005 — Department Database

The department shall develop and maintain a database on roadside vehicle inspection reports for defects on any intermodal equipment. The database shall include all citations involving intermodal equipment issued by officers certified under Section 644.101 (Certification of Certain Peace Officers) . The database shall be used to identify violations discovered on intermodal equipment during a roadside inspection.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1227, Sec. 10, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*
